description: Tracksuit has a grey jacket with mock collar and a full zippered front, long sleeves with red panels and elasticated cuffs, embroidered brand logo on the left chest, two insert pockets on the sides with zippered closure, elasticated hemline, mesh liningGrey track pants with breathable mesh lining, elasticated waistband with concealed drawstrings, two insert pockets on the sides, embroidered brand logo on the left, red panel on the sides, concealed drawstrings at hem
